briefdescription.para: This function prints the given data on the console.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to any given data buffer

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the OCP functions to extend and get PCR for requesting ROM services.
This function get X.509 certificate of Device Identity Public Key.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to the OCP client instance.

briefdescription.para: This function get X.509 certificate of Device Attestation Public Key.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to the OCP client instance.

briefdescription.para: This function get self signed Certificate signing Request for DevIK.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to the OCP client instance.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the OCP functions to get X.509 certificate(s) and attest the data using DEVAK and share the signature.

detaileddescription.para: Main function to call the OCP functions to extend and get PCR for requesting ROM services.
